name: luci-theme-footstrap-tooling
description: Lint/a11y tooling only. NOTHING here is shipped: the OpenWrt package is built by luci.mk, which copies htdocs/ and ucode/ verbatim and never invokes node. These devDependencies exist for CI and for local checks.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run audit && npm run conffiles && npm run css-metrics && npm run css-orphans && npm run css-dup && npm run css-i18n && npm run mirror && npm run bang-ok && npm run axes && npm run chrome-fence && npm run export-tier && npm run changelog && npm run i18n && npm run a11y
